title: Firestone Online Idle RPG
description: Firestone: Online Idle RPG is a multiplayer fantasy game with idle rpg mechanics. Collect heroes🧙‍♂️, upgrade their gear & skills, and sent them in AFK battles or go on an incremental clicker frenzy to beat monstrous bosses! Chat with guild friends or engage in PVP⚔️.

title: Oddsparks: An Automation Adventure
description: Design automated workshops for your odd and adorable Sparks to carry and craft everything, including more of themselves. Lead your squad of Sparks into combat. Explore a strange fantasy world, in single player or online co-op. Unearth the ancient mystery of the Sparks!

title: Arranger: A Role-Puzzling Adventure
description: Find your way in a world of breezy, thoughtful puzzles, along a charming journey of self-discovery.

title: Trash Goblin
description: A wholesome, cosy shopkeeping game with no pressures, no stress, and endless good vibes! Uncover and clean trinkets then upcycle them to sell to endless colourful, quirky customers. Spend your savings to upgrade your shop, buy better tools, plus expand and customise your space.
